note_es: Fuente dinámica de rasgos y efectos para Specialized Classes 2.2.2. Datos extraídos del ZIP del mod: config/traits.json + characterclasses.json. Compatibilidades de Combat Overhaul/XSkills no se mezclan en los stats base para evitar doble conteo.

traits.description_en_official: Can recycle clutter into rot, can recycle lore items into parchment, can use rot to make aged wooden and stone building blocks, can make paper lanterns, and can craft the unique scroll case backpack
Can copy blueprints using parchment and a sieve
Can forge broken blackguard armor from scrap, can make cheaper forges and bellows, and has access to the brass swage block, to craft metal bits into metal crafting components in bulk

Can form clay into bricks, shingles and tiles in bulk using molds, can obtain lime more efficiently, and can use lime directly in mortar and plaster. Can make twice as many mudbricks and raw daub, and can craft the unique soil bag backpack

Can craft cheaper and earlier kitchen and ranching tools, can obtain salt more efficiently, can cure meats by hand, can create vintage beef, can cheaply craft shelf-stable universal animal feed, and can craft the unique insulated crate backpack
Recipes for meat racks are much cheaper
Recipes for butchery workstations are much cheaper
Recipes for cooled storage are available earlier in progression
Recipes for fillet are more efficient with a cleaver, and smoked meats can be hand-cured

Can carve mechanical power components at double yield, can fry a base return teleporter to turn a rusty gear into a temporal gear, and can repair fried base return teleporters with any jonas part. Can use the tinkerer's workstation to make metal parts and jonas parts out of cupronickel
Recipes for reinforced windmills, brakes, and axles use any metal instead of only iron
Can grind up fertilizer components more efficiently, can hoe charcoal, bonemeal and compost through soil to permanently improve its fertility, can make stinkbait more efficiently
+100% swim speed
Recipes for fish baskets are cheaper, plus earthworm castings from soil and worms

Can degrade soil fertility to duplicate flowers. Can create color pigments and use them to paint paintings, vessels, flowerpots, planters, and wallpaper. Can make cheaper linen poultices, can make filled beenades. Can use the sprouting table to turn saplings and compost into leaves, and can propagate flowers with compost there as well
Recipes for potion base from horsetail and cattails, plus edible herbs at quadruple yield
Recipes for apiary components are much cheaper
Recipes for apiary components are much cheaper, and aged langstroth hives can be assembled without tools

Can carve boards early with a knife. Can craft boards and firewood more efficiently, and can carve boards into sticks. Can craft charcoal directly out of firewood. Can create aged wooden building blocks using firewood. Can use the woodcarving table to craft unworked logs into a multitude of wooden objects and building blocks directly
Recipes for tool handle upgrades are available earlier in progression
Recipes for tool handle upgrades are available earlier in progression
Can turn pelts into scraped hides, and can turn soaked hides into twice as many scraped hides. Can use reeds as fletching for arrows, and carve bones into bone arrows
Recipes for butchering bags are much cheaper, and bone arrows can be fletched with reeds
50% less affected by carcass weight.
Recipes for specialized arrows use reeds instead of feathers
Recipes for jerky are double yield and do not require salt for fish jerky
Can create scrap weapon kits out of stones, sticks, and grass. Can make aged torch holders out of scrap and nails, and can recycle rusty gears into metal scrap

Can create specialist bags, has cheaper recipes for normal bags, and exclusive access to the 10-slot messenger bag. Has cheaper recipes for lanterns, paths, and roads. Has exclusive access to the 1.5x asphalt road
Recipes for floating docks and rafts are much cheaper

Can create a variety of aged and otherwise rare stone building blocks. Can use clay instead of mortar to assemble stone bricks. Can break rock into stones, gravel, and sand, and can assemble 8 stones back into solid rock. Can use the stonecutting bench to make a multitude of stone building blocks directly
Recipes for splitter plugs are cheaper
Hammering any splitting plug advances all connected plugs in the network at the same time

Can more efficiently process minerals like sulfur, lime, salt, borax, and salt. Can make saltpeter out of compost and lime. Can make bombs with much less linen. Can make exclusive metallic, crystalline or carbonaceous paydirt to aim for certain panning outputs
Can craft a spindle to more effectively spin flax fibers and papyrus from grass, flax twine from flax fibers, and rope from reeds and vines

Can craft cheaper and earlier liquid storage and processing, can turn quartz into clear quartz, and can make bush cuttings out of berries and high fertility soil. Can use the sprouting table with compost to turn fruits into bush or tree cuttings
Recipes for bottle racks and glass bottles are available earlier in progression, plus cork from firewood
Recipes for alchemy tools are more efficient
Recipes for liquid storage are available earlier in progression
